name: browser-fetch-router
description: Shared browser and web-fetch router CLI for coding agents with centralized routing, approvals, cache, cost controls, audit, and cleanup.

interface.shortDescription: Shared web and browser access CLI for coding agents
interface.longDescription: Use Browser Fetch Router to route public web reads, user-tab reads, and interactive browser tasks through one policy-aware CLI with approvals, URL safety, cache, cost controls, audit logging, and cleanup.
defaultPrompt: Read this web page through browser-fetch-router.
Use browser-fetch-router for this browser task.
